title: As Global Conflicts Go Digital, Businesses Need Wartime Gameplans
summary: The fate of a Ukrainian tax software company shows how modern cyberwarfare can claim casualties far beyond the battlefield, and how businesses across the ocean still need to protect themselves.
imageAlt: As Global Conflicts Go Digital, Businesses Need Wartime Gameplans
